title: File Column - Sort files
excerpt: We keep a good number of files in a files column and it is very useful. The problem we have is that the files seem to be displayed in the order that they were uploaded and I’m not seeing a way to sort them in alpha order…

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: We keep a good number of files in a files column and it is very useful. The problem we have is that the files seem to be displayed in the order that they were uploaded and I’m not seeing a way to sort them in alpha order so it is easier to find a certain file. Am I missing something or is there a work-around for this?

posts.author: Silas (Silas G.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi psperry,

there is only one way jet to sort by file name in alpha order in Monday.
And this possible only with one file per row.
Within a column, the order is not adjustable. (Allways sorted by upload date)

Extra tipp: Open a file in monday, click on “gallary” on the right side and you are able to search for files within a cell and you have an better overview.

~ Silas

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
